content:
## AI Startups in Barcelona That Raised Funding

Barcelona has a growing AI startup ecosystem. Here are notable AI startups based in Barcelona that have raised funding:

### AI Infrastructure & Platform

| Startup | Focus | Funding | Key Investors |
|---------|-------|---------|---------------|
| **Nuclia** | RAG-as-a-Service platform, AI-powered search & generative answers | $5.4M Seed (Apr 2022) | Crane Venture Partners, Elaia |
| **NeuralTrust** | Securing AI Agents and LLMs for enterprises | Seed (Dec 2024) from Venture Friends; Grant (Jun 2025) | Venture Friends, Europa |
| **Galtea** | AI evaluation platform for reliable AI agents in production | €2.7M (~$3.2M) Seed (Mar 2026) | Mozilla Ventures, 42 Capital |
| **MLCode** | Data security automation for AI/ML; agentic AI platform | Seed (May 2024) | Bullnet Capital |

### AI Applications

| Startup | Focus | Funding | Key Investors |
|---------|-------|---------|---------------|
| **Restb.ai** | Deep learning image recognition for real estate | €1.7M EU Horizon 2020 grant (2018); €1.2M investment round (2017) | Capitana Venture Partners, EU/EIC |
| **Kloutit** | AI-powered chargeback management | €540K Seed (Dec 2024) | Banco Sabadell, Lanai Ventures |
| **Candam** | AI-native computer vision | Seed (Oct 2024) | Sogrape and others |
| **Mediktor** | AI-based medical triage and pre-diagnosis chatbot | Multiple rounds (Series A+) | — |
| **Hubtype** | AI chatbots for customer support | $1.12M Seed (May 2019) | K Fund, Catalonia Trade & Investment |
| **Verbio Technologies** | Speech technology (voice recognition, NLU, text-to-speech) | Grant funding | EIC Fund, Europa |

### AI in SaaS (Recent Rounds)

| Startup | Focus | Funding | Key Investors |
|---------|-------|---------|---------------|
| **Replexica** | AI-powered localization | Seed (2024) | Y Combinator |
| **Feeder** | AI tool (Techstars-backed) | Seed (Mar 2024) | Techstars |

### Market Context

- The AI Infrastructure sector in Barcelona comprises ~15 companies, with 7 funded, having collectively raised ~$14.6M.
- AI companies in Barcelona's SaaS sector have raised ~$29.8M over the last 10 years.
- Barcelona leads deep tech startup funding in Southern Europe with €124M raised.
- Galtea, spun off from the Barcelona Supercomputing Centre in 2024, is among the most recent AI startups to raise funding in the city (March 2026).

Notable local AI investors include **Nina Capital**, **Bcombinator**, **Banco Sabadell**, **Nauta Capital**, and **Plug and Play Tech Center**.

# Barcelona’s Galtea raises €2.7 million, backed by Mozilla Ventures, for its AI evaluation platform

Rahul Raj
Galtea

Galtea, a Barcelona-based AI evaluation platform that helps enterprises and developers ship reliable AI agents in production, today announced a €2.7 million ($3.2 million) Seed funding round. [...] “Thorough testing and simulations for accuracy, performance, behaviour, and security are the only way developers can know how their platform will perform in a real-world setting. Galtea is providing generative AI developer teams with infrastructure to overcome barriers to AI adoption and deploy systems reliably, scalably, and efficiently.” [...] Founded by Jorge Palomar and Baybars Külebi, Galtea was spun off from the Barcelona Supercomputing Centre in 2024. Galtea provides enterprise AI teams with continuous, dynamic test scenarios and tailored metrics to evaluate their agents, so teams can use them to inform the best course of action.

document.name: Barcelona’s Galtea raises €2.7 million, backed by Mozilla Ventures, for its AI evaluation platform | EU-Startups

Albert Algarra, CEO of Kloutit, expressed optimism about the funding’s potential to advance the company’s mission: “The funding raised so far not only allows us to invest more in technology and customer acquisition, but we have also been able to surround ourselves with investors, whose experience and knowledge can bring a lot to the project with their ideas and feedback.” [...] Kloutit, founded in 2024, focuses on using AI to simplify and improve the chargeback process. The company claims an 80% success rate in helping businesses defend against chargebacks.

## Kloutit Platform Offering

Kloutit’s platform uses AI to automate chargeback management, reducing financial losses and helping prevent disputes. Users can upload emails, invoices, or images to create a custom defense in under 30 seconds. [...] Diego Camilleri, General Partner at Lanai Ventures, shared his enthusiasm for the startup: “Kloutit brings together all the ingredients we look for in an investment. Its founding team combines a deep knowledge of the problem, as Albert was responsible for this issue at Stayforlong, and the technological and strategic expertise of Adrián and Alexis, who complete an exceptional team. We are proud to lead this round alongside leading investors such as BStartup and industry experts, including

Our friends at Restb.ai, an image recognition AI startup from Barcelona, just announced that they have secured a €1,2M investment round. Founded in the final months of 2015 and running through the accelerator program Startup Catalonia ACCIO, it took the AI firm less than two years to develop a state-of-the-art image recognition technology that processes millions of [...] millions of images with an accuracy rate of 99%. As regards to what the funding means for the image recognition startup, it will be mostly used to continue developing the technology as well as accelerating the international expansion of the company. As Ángel Esteban, CEO of Restb.ai, points out, the added capital will enable the firm to take the startup to the next level both in current and foreign markets.
